name: place-home-full-mvp
title: Place/Home 未做项全量实现 MVP
description: 补齐 Place/Home Deferred MVP：后端持久字段、API/contracts、Home 成员、学校关系审批、前端创建/详情 UI、WORLD_SCHEMA 与 Trellis spec。
creator: lijin
notes:
2026-04-27: Completed the previously deferred Place/Home MVP rather than marking deferred work as done. Backend now persists finite place_type plus Home members and school enrollment relationships through JSON and MySQL stores; V1 create/update/list/get and new Home/school relationship endpoints enforce Home privacy and school-owner approval. Frontend create/discover/detail flows now use persisted place_type, Home payload normalizers, Home member UI, and school approval UI. WORLD_SCHEMA and Trellis backend/frontend specs document the new contract. No friend/social graph, private messages, dynamic wall, unanchored space, platform-published content, or RPG system was added.

2026-04-27 refinement: Child 04-27-place-relationship-flexible-mvp generalized relationship graph semantics so student-school is one finite relation_type, not the only relation. School endpoint remains a compatibility wrapper.

verification: RED: py -3 -m pytest -q backend\tests\test_v1_place_home_mvp.py --tb=short => failed before implementation because place_type/Home/relationship routes were missing
RED: node .\frontend\scripts\place-types-test.mjs => failed before persisted place_type support in helper
RED: node .\frontend\scripts\place-home-contract-test.mjs => failed before frontend/app/lib/place-home.js existed
py -3 -m pytest -q --tb=short with HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY removed for localhost page tests => 379 passed, 6 warnings
npm --prefix .\frontend test => pass (includes place-home-contract-test and place-types tests)
git diff --check -- touched Place/Home files => pass (line-ending warnings only)
debug_notes: Full pytest first returned 2 tests/test_page.py 502 failures because HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY pointed at 127.0.0.1:7890 and urllib proxied localhost page-server requests.
Re-running tests/test_page.py and then full pytest with those proxy env vars removed passed; code was not changed for that environmental proxy issue.
A TimeContext.local_hour constructor mismatch was exposed by Place/Home list/get tests; the current build_time_context path now passes local_hour and the focused/full backend tests pass.

done: backend finite place_type validation and old-data default tavern
backend create/update payload writes for place_type
JSON and MySQL persistence round-trip for place_type, home_members, place_relationships
Home default/private access and public discovery exclusion
Home member add/list storage with silent/display non-NPC boundary
school_enrollment relationship graph with same-owner auto-approve and cross-owner school approval
frontend create place_type select and Home privacy payload normalization
frontend discover persisted place_type precedence with Home excluded from public chips
frontend Tavern detail Home member and School approval MVP panels
docs/WORLD_SCHEMA.md and Trellis backend/frontend spec updates
out_of_scope_not_built: unanchored free space or traditional map-app features
completion_boundary.claim_rule: Completion claims for future work must cite concrete implemented files and fresh verification output; deferred lists must not be reported as completed unless tests/docs/code exist.
